title: Crocker Amazon, San Francisco CA - Neighborhood Guide | Trulia
content: # Crocker Amazon. ### What Locals Say about Crocker Amazon. 77 % Say it's dog friendly. 59 % Say it's quiet. 55 % Say it's walkable to restaurants. 55 % Say there's wildlife. 52 % Say it's walkable to grocery stores. > "it is a great neighborhood to live and work in also the transportation and busses come readily and I never have to wait long to board a bus ". > "There are several bus lines in the area and it’s about a 20 minute walk to BART - safe during the day and at night. Crocker Amazon Park is also close by and is a great place for your kids to explore! > "Crocker Amazon Park is a great place to walk your dog. Some areas require that your dog be on a leash but in general it’s a great place for you and your dog to get some exercise. ## Homes in Crocker Amazon.

title: People sleep on how much nature is tucked into SF's ...
content: Crocker Amazon is proof. SF is the only major city in the entire country where every single resident lives within a 10 minute walk of a park. #
